ddls:
CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "county_population" INTEGER /* Population of the county */,
  "county_area" REAL /* Area of the county in square miles */,
  "county_website" TEXT /* Official website of the county */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "precincts" (
  "precinct_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each precinct */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county the precinct belongs to */,
  "precinct_name" TEXT /* Name of the precinct */,
  "precinct_population" INTEGER /* Population of the precinct */,
  "precinct_area" REAL /* Area of the precinct in square miles */,
  "precinct_website" TEXT /* Official website of the precinct */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("precinct_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_precincts_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "elections" (
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election */,
  "election_name" TEXT /* Name of the election */,
  "election_type" TEXT /* Type of election (e.g., primary, general, local) */,
  "election_date" TEXT /* Date of the election */,
  "election_year" INTEGER /* Year of the election */,
  "election_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the election */,
  "election_status" TEXT /* Status of the election (e.g., scheduled, in progress, completed) */,
  "election_version" TEXT /* Version of the election data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "offices" (
  "office_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each office */,
  "office_name" TEXT /* Name of the office */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election the office is part of */,
  "office_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the office */,
  "office_term" INTEGER /* Term length for the office */,
  "office_eligibility" TEXT /* Eligibility criteria for the office */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("office_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "candidates" (
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each candidate */,
  "candidate_name" TEXT /* Name of the candidate */,
  "party" TEXT /* Party affiliation of the candidate */,
  "candidate_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the candidate */,
  "candidate_eligibility" TEXT /* Eligibility criteria for the candidate */,
  "candidate_contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the candidate */,
  "candidate_website" TEXT /* Official website of the candidate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "votes" (
  "vote_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vote */,
  "precinct_id" INTEGER /* ID of the precinct where the vote was cast */,
  "office_id" INTEGER /* ID of the office the vote is for */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candidate the vote is for */,
  "votes" INTEGER /* Number of votes cast for the candidate */,
  "voting_method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the voting method used */,
  "ballot_type" TEXT /* Type of ballot used (e.g., paper, electronic) */,
  "vote_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the vote was cast */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vote_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_votes_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_votes_voting_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("voting_method_id") REFERENCES voting_methods ("voting_method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_votes_office_id FOREIGN KEY ("office_id") REFERENCES offices ("office_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_votes_precinct_id FOREIGN KEY ("precinct_id") REFERENCES precincts ("precinct_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voting_methods" (
  "voting_method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each voting method */,
  "voting_method_name" TEXT /* Name of the voting method (e.g., absentee, early voting, election day, provisional) */,
  "voting_method_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the voting method */,
  "voting_method_eligibility" TEXT /* Eligibility criteria for the voting method */,
  "voting_method_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the voting method */,
  "voting_method_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the voting method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("voting_method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "absentee_votes" (
  "absentee_vote_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each absentee vote */,
  "precinct_id" INTEGER /* ID of the precinct where the absentee vote was cast */,
  "office_id" INTEGER /* ID of the office the absentee vote is for */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candidate the absentee vote is for */,
  "votes" INTEGER /* Number of absentee votes cast for the candidate */,
  "ballot_type" TEXT /* Type of ballot used (e.g., paper, electronic) */,
  "vote_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the vote was cast */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("absentee_vote_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_absentee_votes_precinct_id FOREIGN KEY ("precinct_id") REFERENCES precincts ("precinct_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_absentee_votes_office_id FOREIGN KEY ("office_id") REFERENCES offices ("office_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_absentee_votes_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "early_voting_votes" (
  "early_voting_vote_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each early voting vote */,
  "precinct_id" INTEGER /* ID of the precinct where the early voting vote was cast */,
  "office_id" INTEGER /* ID of the office the early voting vote is for */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candidate the early voting vote is for */,
  "votes" INTEGER /* Number of early voting votes cast for the candidate */,
  "ballot_type" TEXT /* Type of ballot used (e.g., paper, electronic) */,
  "vote_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the vote was cast */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("early_voting_vote_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_early_voting_votes_office_id FOREIGN KEY ("office_id") REFERENCES offices ("office_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_early_voting_votes_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_early_voting_votes_precinct_id FOREIGN KEY ("precinct_id") REFERENCES precincts ("precinct_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "election_day_votes" (
  "election_day_vote_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election day vote */,
  "precinct_id" INTEGER /* ID of the precinct where the election day vote was cast */,
  "office_id" INTEGER /* ID of the office the election day vote is for */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candidate the election day vote is for */,
  "votes" INTEGER /* Number of election day votes cast for the candidate */,
  "ballot_type" TEXT /* Type of ballot used (e.g., paper, electronic) */,
  "vote_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the vote was cast */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("election_day_vote_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_day_votes_office_id FOREIGN KEY ("office_id") REFERENCES offices ("office_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_day_votes_precinct_id FOREIGN KEY ("precinct_id") REFERENCES precincts ("precinct_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_day_votes_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "provisional_votes" (
  "provisional_vote_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each provisional vote */,
  "precinct_id" INTEGER /* ID of the precinct where the provisional vote was cast */,
  "office_id" INTEGER /* ID of the office the provisional vote is for */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candidate the provisional vote is for */,
  "votes" INTEGER /* Number of provisional votes cast for the candidate */,
  "ballot_type" TEXT /* Type of ballot used (e.g., paper, electronic) */,
  "vote_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the vote was cast */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("provisional_vote_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_provisional_votes_precinct_id FOREIGN KEY ("precinct_id") REFERENCES precincts ("precinct_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_provisional_votes_office_id FOREIGN KEY ("office_id") REFERENCES offices ("office_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_provisional_votes_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., election official, data analyst, admin) */,
  "user_contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the user */,
  "user_department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "user_supervisor" TEXT /* Supervisor of the user */,
  "user_hire_date" TEXT /* Date the user was hired */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the voting data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the voting data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used to access the data */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "election_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election result */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election the result is for */,
  "office_id" INTEGER /* ID of the office the result is for */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candidate the result is for */,
  "votes" INTEGER /* Number of votes received by the candidate */,
  "result_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the result was recorded */,
  "result_status" TEXT /* Status of the result (e.g., provisional, final) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_results_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_results_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_results_office_id FOREIGN KEY ("office_id") REFERENCES offices ("office_id")
)
